news.title: Trump cancels signing of bipartisan housing bill, demanding voter-ID provision
news.summary: President Donald Trump cancels signing of a bill aimed at increasing housing affordability. He was due to sign the bill at the Capitol an hour before the ceremony.

news.title: U.S. crude oil dips below $70 as tankers transit Strait of Hormuz
news.summary: U.S. President Donald Trump intensified pressure on oil companies to lower gasoline prices following the recent decline in crude. U.S.-based oil companies are under pressure to lower gas prices.

news.title: Amazon's Zoox unveils redesigned robotaxi ahead of upcoming expansion
news.summary: Zoox is updating its robotaxis as the Amazon division plots expansion in additional markets. The company is also preparing to charge for rides.

news.title: Slate Auto says each $24,950 electric pickup truck will be profitable as it aims to be cash-flow positive next year
news.summary: Slate Auto CEO Peter Faricy says every vehicle the company produces will be gross margin positive. Faricy: "Every vehicle we produce will be Gross Margin positive"

news.title: New meme stock Wendy's soars 30% with trading halted at one point
news.summary: The magnitude of the move suggests other forces may be at play. While management changes can influence investor sentiment, the magnitude of this one suggests other factors may be in play.

news.title: Broadcom unveils a custom chip for OpenAI as it challenges Nvidia’s dominance
news.summary: The custom chip is designed to support the ChatGPT maker’s future AI models and products. The chip is expected to be available by the end of the year.

news.title: Tesla and Waymo duel in the robotaxi race — but the company spending the most builds no cars at all
news.summary: Uber is quietly writing $500 million checks to lock in robotaxis. Waymo threatens to leave it behind. Uber says it's working with Waymo to develop a self-driving car.

news.title: My houseguest left heat marks all over my table. I didn’t notice them until she was gone. Do I ask her to pay to remove them?
news.summary: “What drives me crazy is that she didn’t mention it,” he says of his wife. “What drove me crazy was she didn't mention it.”

news.title: ‘I’m scared of making a huge financial mistake’: I gave my brother half of my $1.5 million home. Can he force me to sell?
news.summary: “One lawyer estimated that my brother and I would each walk away with a couple hundred thousand dollars,” he said. “One lawyer estimated that we would each walked away from the case with a few hundred thousands dollars.”

news.title: Is Wendy’s the next meme stock? Everyday traders are trying to ‘save’ the fast-food chain.
news.summary: Shares of fast-food chain Wendy's rallied 25% at Wednesday’s open. Wendy's shares were up 25% to $16.50 at the open.
